title: mentha ensidens
intro: Mentha ensidens, a lesser-known species of mint, is a flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family. It is native to the Himalayas and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has several health benefits, including the relief of digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems. Mentha ensidens is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
